mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMP_FILE ( file_no , file_type_cd , emp_no , file_nm , save_file_nm , file_path , file_size , file_ext , use_yn , reg_dtm ) VALUES ( SEQ_EMP_FILE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{fileTypeCd}, #{refNo}, #{fileMeta.fileNm}, #{fileMeta.saveFileNm}, #{fileMeta.filePath}, #{fileMeta.fileSize}, #{fileMeta.fileExt}, 'Y', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT WORK_DRIVE_NO, DEPT_CD, FILE_TYPE_CD, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, EMP_NM, USE_YN, REG_DTM FROM WORK_DRIVE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY REG_DTM DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORK_DRIVE ( WORK_DRIVE_NO, DEPT_CD, FILE_TYPE_CD, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, EMP_NM ) VALUES ( SEQ_WORK_DRIVE.NEXTVAL, #{refNo}, #{fileTypeCd}, #{fileMeta.fileNm}, #{fileMeta.saveFileNm}, #{fileMeta.filePath}, #{fileMeta.fileSize}, #{fileMeta.fileExt}, #{fileMeta.empNm} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE WORK_DRIVE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE WORK_DRIVE_NO IN
#{no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMP_FILE ( FILE_NO, EMP_NO, FILE_TYPE_CD, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, USE_YN, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( SEQ_EMP_FILE.NEXTVAL, #{refNo}, #{fileTypeCd}, #{fileMeta.fileNm}, #{fileMeta.saveFileNm}, #{fileMeta.filePath}, #{fileMeta.fileSize}, #{fileMeta.fileExt}, 'Y', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT EMP_NO as refNo, FILE_TYPE_CD as fileTypeCd, FILE_NM as "fileMeta.fileNm", SAVE_FILE_NM as "fileMeta.saveFileNm", FILE_PATH as "fileMeta.filePath", FILE_SIZE as "fileMeta.fileSize", FILE_EXT as "fileMeta.fileExt" FROM EMP_FILE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND FILE_TYPE_CD = 'PROFILE' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE EMP_FILE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND FILE_TYPE_CD = 'PROFILE' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
